displayNameZh: 挑选游戏引擎的两个条件
summary: Yt Engine Criteria component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「挑选游戏引擎的两个条件」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-engine-criteria/src/YtEngineCriteria.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtEngineCriteria` and `ytEngineCriteriaDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Engine Criteria Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-engine-criteria to my project. Preserve the exported YtEngineCriteriaProps API and register the YtEngineCriteria composition with the default props.
